entry.notes: Look for RSI oversold + volume spike + EMA support as confluence. Minimum 2 confluent signals before entering.

exit.notes: 2:1 risk/reward minimum. Trail stop after 1R gain. Exit if daily close below entry EMA. Don't hold through earnings.

positionSizing.notes: Risk 1-2% of account per trade. Size = (Account * RiskPct) / (Entry - Stop). Never size into a gap open.

avoidList: Stocks with average daily volume under 500k
